g.text: Query Optimizer: Rule-Based Logic State Machine

ul.li: Fixed-Point Iteration: Logic keeps looping until the tree stops changing.
Changed Flag: Any successful transformation sets this to true.
Convergence: Reached when a full pass results in no modifications.
Safety Break: Prevents infinite recursion in oscillating rule sets.

g.title: Load ConstantFolding, PredicatePushdown, and ProjectionPruning rules.
Execute a single transformation pass across the Logical Plan tree.
Fixed-Point Logic: Has the tree converged?
Optimization complete. Pass refined tree to CBO.
Infinite loop detected in rule transformations.

ul.li: If R(Node) transforms: set changed_flag = true

g.text: Result is a well-formed LogicalPlanNode tree
